channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Questions Arise Over $14M Reflecting Pool Renovation as Paint Peels Off Bottom
item.description: Washington's iconic Reflecting Pool remains green with algae, and now the 'American Flag Blue' paint is peeling from the bottom.

item.title: Legendary 'Robin Hood' oak tree in the U.K. has died.
item.description: A 1,200-year-old oak tree associated with the Robin Hood legend has died, UK scientists report.

item.title: Trump awards Medal of Honor to three veterans for Vietnam and Afghanistan heroism.
item.description: President Donald Trump awarded the Medal of Honor to three veterans for their bravery in Vietnam and Afghanistan.

item.title: What is missing from the Epstein files?
item.description: The Justice Department says it released all required Epstein files, but CBS News has found significant omissions.
